author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas Technical Test - Discord Only #2 

Hey everyone!

Gear up for the second Discord-community only technical test this Saturday at 2PM ET! We've made a number of adjustments that should significantly reduce the lag, as well as a number of other bug fixes/changes that can be found in ⁠🩹┃patch-notes

As a reminder, a brand new game mode called Surge will be played during this technical test. Surge is a faction vs. faction vs. faction 3rd person shooter combat game mode focused on bringing glory to your team by eliminating opposing factions and scoring points.    

As long as you have already redeemed a Star Atlas Epic Games Store key, you can help us test! Mark interested on the event below and we'll see you in the Volant Station! (Note: This technical test doesn't have rewards but the public test will)

 | https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1225529557814214789
